ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol followed in the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "regulatory_approval" INTEGER /* Whether the study has received regulatory approval */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the visit belongs to */,
  "centre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center where the visit took place */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient who made the visit */,
  "visit_number" INTEGER /* Number of the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES patients ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_centre_id FOREIGN KEY ("centre_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the center */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "consent_form" INTEGER /* Whether the patient has signed the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocol_data" (
  "protocol_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol data entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the data belongs to */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "lab_results" TEXT /* Lab results */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Medication information */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Adverse event reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_data_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protocol_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES patients ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Expected or actual end date of the study
Whether the study has received regulatory approval
ID of the study the visit belongs to
ID of the center where the visit took place
ID of the patient who made the visit
Additional notes or comments about the visit
